creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
On 9.0-current dtrace(1) man page gives at the very end:

SEE ALSO
       cpp(1),  isainfo(1),  libdtrace(3LIB),  driver.conf(4),  attributes(5),
       dtrace(7D)


of these only cpp(1) man page exists.

Also, do we even have categories "3LIB" or "7D" in fbsd?

thanks
anton
